status: PROVISIONAL — frozen ONLY after Stage 1 first E2E loop (S-7) validates it; never before
governance: authoritative versioned PROJECT contract, subordinate to the constitution — NOT law
authority: plan App C §C.3 / App B §B.5 / App D §D.2.1

events.name: ProjectAdopted
events.stage: Boot/Adopt — Project Spec consumed as Boot INPUT [Art. IV]

events.name: GoalStateAccepted
events.stage: GoalState accepted (GoalStateRatified is a retired alias)

events.name: WorkerDispatched
events.stage: dispatch to replaceable Worker (carries ordinary authorization — a Tape event, NOT a 3rd-ref advance)

events.name: HumanSteerInjected
events.stage: typed Human Steer event injected into the loop

events.name: MacroObservationImported
events.stage: import Macro Git/worktree/PR/CI evidence (Macro never directly sovereign)

events.name: PredicateEvaluated
events.stage: deterministic Predicate result recorded on tape [Art. I.1]

events.name: CandidateAccepted
events.stage: PASS path — new sovereign world state admitted

events.name: FailureNode
events.stage: FAIL path — failure-is-state [Art. 0.2/0.3]; carries failure_class; classify -> retry/recompile

events.name: HandoffGenerated
events.stage: Replay/Handoff produced; also records explicit writer handoff

notes: Only the 7 SOVEREIGN_ACCEPT events advance accepted_head, and each ONLY on a deterministic Predicate PASS [Art. I.1].
head_effect is REGISTRY-DERIVED: never writer-trusted. An envelope whose carried head_effect disagrees with registry[type].class is REJECTED.
failure_class (payload axis on FailureNode) is orthogonal to event_type (envelope axis); the failure-class registry is a separate companion contract.
Names are append-only and never renumbered. A new type is a project-level registry amendment, not a constitution amendment.
